social.text: Perseverar es sostener el bien, cuidar la Paz, defender la verdad y seguir en oración. ¡Fe y unión!

social.text: RT by @Keir_Starmer: Зустрівся із Прем’єр-міністром Великої Британії Кіром Стармером. Ми в Україні цінуємо всі кроки Великої Британії для підтримки нашого народу та послаблення агресора, зокрема в боротьбі проти російського тіньового флоту. Говорили про це сьогодні з Кіром. Приді

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: Over the coming decade, we will add 350 billion NIS to the defense budget to manufacture these munitions here in Israel, ensuring we are not dependent on foreign sources.

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: As for the drones: A few weeks ago, I ordered the establishment of a special project to thwart the drone threat, and a progress report on the matter will be presented to me today. It will take time, but we are on it.

social.text:
Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu:

"Israel is stronger than ever, and Israel must always be significantly stronger than our enemies.

Therefore, I advocate for two principles: Strengthening and independence.

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
RT by @Keir_Starmer: Great to welcome our PM Keir Starmer yesterday and hear his support for the work Camden Labour is doing.

Use all 3 of your votes for Camden Labour so we can keep delivering for our community.

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text: Pinned: Video

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text:
RT by @realDonaldTrump: On behalf of Erin and me, thank you to everyone for the love and support we've received. We both had an unforgettable wedding day, and we'll never forget it. We're humbled and grateful to all.

THANK YOU! 🙏🏻🇺🇸🦅🚀
